title: Stainless Steel Chains, 5 Metre Heavy Duty Chain Links, Metal Chain Security Chain, 1.5mm Galvanized Steel Welded Link Chains for Fence Gate Door Bike Bicycle Swing Security Lock Lift Chains
features: Sturdy and Durable Material: The heavy duty chain is made of high-quality stainless steel, with a polished surface that is rust-proof, moisture-proof, and corrosion-resistant. It is strong and the color will not fall off after long-term use, and has long-lasting durability and stability.

Easy to Use: 5 meters in length, 1.5 mm in diameter, strong load-bearing capacity, not easily broken or damaged, and not easily deformed. Stainless steel chains can be customized and cut into different sizes for use in different fields.

Wide Range of Applications: Suitable for home or commercial use, suitable for use in security doors, garage doors, dog walking, DIY production, jewelry production, daily life, mechanical transmission and traction and other fields.

Versatility: The security chain can be used for swing chains, clothes drying chains, potted plants, chandeliers, bicycle locks, garden fences, lifting chains, pet chains, anchor chains, guardrails, hanging chains, safety chains, sunshade sail chains, etc.

Satisfactory Customer Service: We are committed to providing you with a satisfactory shopping experience. For any assistance with your order, feel free to contact us anytime, our team is ready to reply within 24 hrs and resolve any issues.
description: What are the advantages of our stainless steel chains? The gate chain is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is rust-proof, moisture-proof, corrosion-resistant, has strong load-bearing capacity, is sturdy and durable, and has long-lasting stability. The steel chain length is 5 meters and the diameter is 1.5 mm. Metal chain heavy duty can be customized cutting into different sizes for different field requirements.
